Inspiration Mood Board

The overall feeling is elegant afternoon tea: vintage cups, soft flowers, cream tableware, pink bows, cupcakes, scones, sandwiches, cloud/white details and a pretty garden/tent setup.

Planning

Inside setup ideas

Tea-party tables, vintage cups, floral centrepieces, bows, white/pink/cream palette, cloud-style balloon area.

Options: diapers, wipes and money OR mum-to-be provides a gift list.

Planning

Baby shower game ideas

Guess baby date, baby bingo, advice cards, nappy messages, don’t say baby, mum trivia.
